name: Evolution Strategy-Based Calibration for Low-Bit Quantization of Speech Models

description: arXiv:2603.08173v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quantization has become essential for the efficient deployment of speech processing systems. Although widely studied, most existing quantization methods were developed for vision and NLP architectures, while the specific challenges of audio signals remain largely overlooked. In particular, we show that audio activations can exhibit large...
author: Lucas Rakotoarivony
